Name: SC Johnson Professional USA
Description:
SC Johnson Professional is part of SC Johnson, a family company and one of the world's leading manufacturers of household cleaning products and products for home storage, air care, pest control and shoe care, as well as professional products. The company has a long history in the professional market, in which it started operating in the 1930’s.

SC Johnson Professional provides expert skin care, cleaning & hygiene solutions for industrial, institutional and healthcare users. This incorporates the Deb range of specialist occupational skin care products along with well-known SC Johnson brands and innovative professional cleaning & hygiene products. 

The SC Johnson Professional purpose is to bring innovative, quality products and services to professional markets with outstanding performance that respect the environment, create efficiencies, reduce inventories, simplify training and provide a positive user experience. This is built on a deep understanding of customer needs and a vision for ‘rethinking the professional experience’ with the user in mind.

Name: ChemiTek Solar
Description:

With an already diversified portfolio, the company presents solutions for sectors such as solar, glass and automotive.
Highly specialised unique solutions for cleaning and optimising solar panels, as well as protecting and cleaning glass, and helping to improve efficiency in industries such as automotive and marine. 

One of the biggest concerns of our company is to develop 100% environmental friendly solutions which are in line with the sustainability policy of the company. All our products are biodegradable!
It aims to be a reference in the international market, as a customer-centric, innovative and sustainable chemical company.

Bénéficiant d'un savoir-faire reconnu depuis 1992, les Laboratoires BEA sont également une entreprise engagée (Ecovadis Platinium 2023). La démarche éco-responsable est au cœur de leur développement.
Nous sommes à votre disposition pour vous accompagner à toutes les étapes du développement de vos projets cosmétiques :

-       Conception et formulation
-       Fabrication et conditionnement
-       Gestion des packagings
-       Qualité, support à la certification Cosmos, NOP,…

Name: SC Johnson Professional Europe
Description:
We are SC Johnson Professional Europe, part of SC Johnson – a family company at work for a better world. We specialise in providing expert skin care, cleaning and hygiene solutions for industrial, institutional, and healthcare organisations. 

Our mission is simple: we support our customers in creating safe and healthy environments for the people they care for, in a sustainable way.  

We don’t just make products, we help our customers deliver safe and healthy outcomes to help them reduce the spread of germs and keep skin in good condition.  

We are a company that celebrates our origins, built on brands that include Deb Stoko, Swarfega, Stokolan, and Cutan. We’ve been innovating for decades, our global RD&E teams are behind pioneering developments such as the first commercial foaming soap dispensers and mobile surface cleaning trigger sprays. Today, we continue to set high standards in performance, efficiency, and sustainability. 

We are relentless in our efforts to make our products, programmes, and processes better.Use less. Waste less. Recycle more. This is the philosophy that underpins what we do. The use of plastics and the chemistry of our products is particularly where we focus, as this is where we can make the biggest impact with our products. 

At SC Johnson Professional Europe, we believe safe, productive environments are built when people have the right tools, knowledge, and support. That’s why we go beyond products to offer training, best practice programmes, and tailored support that empower people in their work to create healthier, more efficient workplaces. 

Because at the end of the day: your world means the world to us.

Name: Nazar Kimya
Description:
Nazar Kimya was established in 1982, initially operating from a 500 m² indoor facility. By 2001, it had expanded to a 7,500 m² production site in the Anatolian Side Organized Industrial Zone, reaching an annual manufacturing capacity of 40,000 tons. The company serves the industry with its state-of-the-art machinery and deep-rooted sector expertise.

A sector leader in soft soaps, liquid soaps, and grout cleaners, Nazar Kimya is also among the top three manufacturers of bleach in Türkiye. The company continues its production activities both domestically and internationally, not only with its own brands but also through extensive Private Label manufacturing, thereby ensuring consumers have access to quality products at affordable prices.

Nazar Kimya strictly adheres to Quality, Environmental Management, and Occupational Health & Safety standards in compliance with applicable laws and regulations, reviewing and improving these processes regularly. With this commitment, the company strives to set an example in the Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) sector in terms of quality.

The company’s professional and disciplined team has earned key certifications: ISO 9001 (Quality Management), ISO 14001 (Environmental Management), and ISO 45001 (Occupational Health & Safety). It also holds ISO 22716 and BRC AA certifications, demonstrating full compliance with international standards in product and production processes.

Private Label manufacturing holds a significant place in the company’s strategy, comprising 50% of its annual production. Collaborating with the largest retail groups in Türkiye, Nazar Kimya contributes to the success of many local businesses. As a 100% Turkish-funded company, Nazar Kimya is also actively represented on international platforms with its team of dedicated experts.

Name: Chiefs Australia
Description:
Chiefs’ touchless cleaning products are designed to save you time, effort and money on routine vehicle, fleet, and heavy equipment cleaning.

We're wholesalers of a range of touchless soaps, hardware, and pressure cleaners, and operate via a network of authorised dealers across Australia.

Soaps:
When you use a concentrated, effective foam-on soap, a little goes a long way—25L is enough to clean approximately 100 prime movers.

Our dense foam breaks the static bond between the grime and the surface. It's designed for touchless cleaning, so there's no need for manual scrubbing or brooming—just let it do it's thing for a minute or two and then blast it away with high-pressure water.

The risk of swirls or scratches is eliminated, and the amount of time and hard work that goes into cleaning is dramatically cut—all while keeping your paintwork in top condition.

Hardware:
Chiefs provides the right tools for the job, no matter what you're cleaning. We have a range of touchless cleaning hardware solutions that can be adapted for any industry.

We supply German- and Swiss-engineered hardware from Suttner and Mosmatic that will stand up to everyday use and the wear and tear inflicted in a busy wash bay. We provide touchless cleaning hardware such as guns, lances, and underbody cleaners, and can also help you design a custom wash bay to suit the specific needs of your business.

By working smarter with a touchless technique, you will save on time and labour costs—whether you're cleaning a fleet of vehicles or tackling long-term staining. 

Chiefs' hardware is adaptable to your pressure cleaner, and with our quick connection system, you can rapidly switch between the tools you need for the job. 

Pressure Cleaners: We work with Australia's industry-leading manufacturers to deliver hardworking, customisable machines for your wash bay.

>>> For more information, contact Chiefs Australia, visit our social pages or check out hundreds of videos on our YouTube channel.

Socio estratégico para la mejora de rendimientos, que permite conocer las necesidades de los clientes para, de esta manera, plantear los sistemas más adecuados en cada caso, con un control permanente sobre el coste final alcanzando el resultado previsto.

La empresa en cifras:
15 millones de facturación
6O empleados
4.300 pedidos al mes
15 rutas/día
40.000 m3 de almacén
5.000m2 de superficie con un volumen de almacenamiento de más de 40.000m3 y 4.500 pallets.
8 muelles de carga y descarga 

En nuestras instalaciones, situadas en Colmenar Viejo disponemos de 5.000m2 de superficie con un volumen de almacenamiento de más de 40.000m3 y 4.500 pallets. Esto nos permite los niveles de stock adecuados para garantizar a nuestros clientes un servicio de calidad.

Las instalaciones constan de un conjunto de estructuras metálicas alternando sistemas de Rack manual, Rack selectivo y estanterías Drive-in, perfectamente señalizados que junto con los cinco muelles neumáticos más dos puertas de carga nos permiten tener una gran agilidad en las tareas de carga y descarga de los pedidos.

Todo ello nos sitúa con una capacidad de distribución por encima de las 4.300 entregas mensuales con un nivel de eficacia del 99% plazos de entrega del 80% en 24 horas, y del 20% en 48 horas.

Name: Mould Check
Description:
Mould Check - Safe, Sustainable, and Strong

Mould Check is a ready-to-use biocidal wash that eliminates 99.99% of viruses, bacteria, spores, and yeast — without the need for mixing or dilution. It is non-toxic, non-corrosive, and safe to handle, requiring PPE only when engaging with the mould pre-treatment.

Key Features & Benefits

        Hazardous chemical free – does not require any COSHH assessment
        Ready to Use – No mixing or dilution required
        Kills 99.99% of viruses, mould, bacteria, spores, and yeast
        Non-toxic & Non-corrosive – Safe for users, surfaces, and the environment
        Leaves no harmful residue – Long-lasting protection with no chemical aftereffects
        Fully tested & accredited – Approved under UK HSE GB Article 95

Powered by Hypochlorous Acid (HOCl)

Mould Check’s active ingredient is <0.02% Hypochlorous Acid (HOCl) – a powerful, naturally occurring disinfectant produced by our own white blood cells to destroy pathogens.

HOCl is 80x more effective than bleach at lower concentrations.
It works by diffusing directly through microbial membranes to destroy pathogens from within
Unlike bleach, it requires no harsh stabilisers, leaving it safe, pH-neutral, and gentle on surfaces.
Why Mould Check Outperforms Bleach-Based Products

Bleach (sodium hypochlorite) is negatively charged and often repelled by microbial cell membranes
HOCl, being neutral and smaller, penetrates cells directly, destroying them efficiently
Bleach requires high concentrations to be effective, making it corrosive and hazardous
Mould Check delivers clinical-grade disinfection without the harsh side effects of traditional chemicals
Accreditations

 HSE GB Article 95 Registered
Mould Check is fully tested and accredited by UK laboratories and is registered under Article 95 with the UK Health and Safety Executive (HSE) as a compliant and proven biocidal mould wash.

Description:
NTI Express Auto Care is a One-stop auto care centre providing professional car wash, car detailing, car coating, car filming, oil change and repair, auto spray paint services.
NTI has consecutively been named as the best car wash and detailing company in Hong Kong by public media. Choice Car Wash - Self-serviced car wash, professional served car wash, your choice! Also, provide professional car detailing services.

FULL-SERVICE CAR WASH
Our touchless car wash services will give your car a spick and span inside-out. No matter using ITouch automatic car wash machine or new Choice car hand wash model, both can give you 360 all around detailing cleaning touch, a genuine touchless wash. Using professional grade pH neutral bubble bath and nano rinse aids can give you a faultlessly clean and protective coating after wash. Final touchup with microfiber cloth for perfection.

DIAMOND GUARD CAR COATING
Diamond Guard adopts latest crystallized fluidic Nano coating technology. Nano polymer filling technology is used to replace the traditional polishing methods to cover up the microscratch marks on car paint rather than cutting up the clear coat, making no damage to the original car paint, resulting in a durable and ultra-shiny 9H hardness stretchable protective coating, very different from traditional coating which only gives hardness but no flexibility.

INTERIOR CLEANING AND DISINFECTION
The Aroma Interior Trio is the ultimate car cleaning, disinfection, and odor control car care service. The 1st procedure is using professional grade interior cleaner to remove oxidized and stubborn stains on car interior material surfaces like upholstery, plastic, wood, leather and metallic surfaces. 

OGII DIAMOND COATING ESSENCE
A new replacement of traditional solvent-based polymer system in the auto-detailing business adopts crystallized fluidic nano polymer technology. A layer of organic nano polymer layer on top of Diamond Guard giving a super durable long-lasting protective layer.

Name: Harbor Master Products
Description:
Harbor Master Cleaner & Degreaser is an exceptional biodegradable cleaner concentrate, originally formulated for the marine industry and wastewater treatment facilities to clean all types of soils such as; petroleum, animal and vegetable oils, fats, grease and fish proteins.  It may be used anywhere that water washing is appropriate.

It can be used as a household cleaner in a light to medium diluted solution. Keep in a spray bottle in the kitchen for the greasy stove top, pots and pans. Great for getting hairspray build up off the bathroom floor. In the wash it removes heavy grease and oil from clothing.

Harbor Master Cleaner is a concentrate and MUST be diluted with water to work effectively.  Its pH approximates that of tap water, allowing the cleaner to work well with hard, soft, hot, cold, fresh or salt water.

Name: Eco Tuccy
Description:
Bienvenidos a Eco Tuccy!
En Eco Tuccy, nos dedicamos con pasión a la fabricación de productos de limpieza biológicos y sostenibles a granel. Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer soluciones de limpieza eficaces que no solo sean seguras para el hogar, sino que también protejan nuestro planeta. Con una visión clara hacia un futuro más verde, nos esforzamos por innovar continuamente y ofrecer productos que cumplen con los más altos estándares de calidad y sostenibilidad.
Hemos desarrollado una gama de productos que destacan por su efectividad y por su impacto positivo en el medio ambiente. Nuestro enfoque está en utilizar ingredientes naturales y procesos de producción sostenibles, minimizando así nuestra huella ecológica y fomentando prácticas de consumo responsable. Cada uno de nuestros productos está diseñado para proporcionar resultados excepcionales, sin comprometer la salud del planeta ni la seguridad de quienes los usan.
Nos enorgullece ser pioneros en la promoción de un estilo de vida más sostenible, ofreciendo alternativas a los productos de limpieza tradicionales que contienen químicos dañinos. Nuestra línea de productos abarca desde limpiadores multiusos y detergentes hasta soluciones especializadas para diversas necesidades de limpieza. Todos nuestros productos se ofrecen a granel, lo que reduce significativamente el uso de envases plásticos y promueve una economía circular.

 Estamos comprometidos con la transparencia y la ética en cada etapa de nuestra cadena de suministro, desde la selección de materias primas hasta la distribución final.
Te invitamos a unirte a nosotros en nuestro viaje hacia un futuro más limpio y sostenible. Juntos, podemos hacer una diferencia significativa en la conservación de nuestro planeta y en la mejora de la calidad de vida de las generaciones futuras. Descubre nuestros productos y sé parte del cambio. Limpia con propósito, elige Eco Tuccy!

Name: Bluezy eco.
Description:
Pioneering the next generation of laundry care, Bluezyeco introduces advanced eco-friendly detergent sheets engineered for maximum performance and minimal environmental impact.

Our ultra-concentrated, biodegradable formula is carefully optimized to deliver exceptional cleaning efficiency while remaining gentle on fabrics and skin. Unlike traditional liquid and powder detergents, our sheets are water-free, lightweight, and fully dissolvable, reducing packaging waste and eliminating the need for bulky plastic bottles.

Key technical advantages include:

    Low-carbon logistics: Compact, lightweight design reduces shipping volume and significantly cuts carbon emissions.

    Zero microplastic release: Our formulations avoid polymeric additives that contribute to microplastic pollution.

    Readily biodegradable ingredients: Ensure rapid breakdown in wastewater treatment systems and natural environments.

    Precise dosing control: Minimizes detergent overuse and reduces residue on textiles.

From raw material selection to final packaging, we prioritize closed-loop design principles, minimizing resource use and environmental impact throughout the entire product life cycle.

At Bluezyeco, we are not just delivering a detergent — we are redefining what sustainable cleaning technology can achieve. Join us in driving the transition to a truly circular, low-impact future.

Name: Blue Bomber
Description:
About Us

Welcome to Industries Nationwide Corporation, a company built on the principles of innovation, sustainability, and community empowerment. As a soap and detergent manufacturer, we have made it our mission to provide high-quality cleaning solutions that not only offer superior performance but also contribute to environmental sustainability and social responsibility. Our products, led by our flagship Blue Bomber multipurpose cleaner, are designed to meet the cleaning needs of both residential consumers and commercial businesses.

Our History and Mission
Founded with a deep commitment to revitalizing local communities, Industries Nationwide Corporation has grown into a trusted name in the cleaning product manufacturing industry. Our mission is twofold: to produce eco-friendly, highly effective cleaning products and to create opportunities for underserved communities by providing training and career development in the sales and manufacturing sectors.

Our origins are rooted in a vision to develop more than just a business. We wanted to create a company that would have a meaningful impact on both the environment and society. From the very beginning, we knew that our success would depend on our ability to deliver innovative products that resonate with the values of today’s consumers—sustainability, safety, and efficacy. With these core values in mind, we developed Blue Bomber, a cleaner that embodies everything Industries Nationwide Corporation stands for.

Our vision extends far beyond producing cleaning products. We are driven by the belief that business success and community revitalization go hand in hand. By building strong partnerships, investing in local economies, and empowering young adults from underserved areas, we aim to make a lasting difference. We believe in providing opportunities for personal and professional growth, especially for those who might not otherwise have access to such resources.

QualyTop has reinvented 3 finishing products for wood and parquet:

- a solvent-free, acrylic-free single-layer oil - NATUR WOODOIL
- a water-based wax - WB WAX QTOP
- a reactive soap in 12 colors - REACTIF SOAP

Ideal for:

- Newly installed or renovated parquet and plank floors.
- Interior finishing and furniture.
- Industrial and factory-finished parquet applications.

Additionally, we've pioneered a new approach to maintaining and renovating your parquet or other wooden structures (including outdoor furniture, etc.) with our WOODSOAP QTOP. Discover the benefits on our website or contact us at info@qualytop.com.

Name: ROLFS Entkalkerstab GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei Rolfs Entkalkerstab – Ihrer nachhaltigen Lösung für eine glänzende Sauberkeit!

Unser Gründer, Rolf Baumgartner, ein erfahrener Schreinermeister, hat eine wegweisende Innovation entwickelt, um hartnäckige Kalkablagerungen in Toiletten, Spülbecken und an Wasserhähnen effizient und umweltschonend zu entfernen. Unser einzigartiges Hilfsmittel, der Entkalkerstab, ist ein gebogener, weisser Stab, der an beiden Enden mit einem Prismenschliff versehen ist. Mit Muskelkraft können Sie Kalkablagerungen mühelos beseitigen, ohne dabei keramische Oberflächen zu beschädigen. Unsere oberste Priorität ist die Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden.

Umweltschutz ist für uns von grösster Bedeutung. Rolf Baumgartner war entschlossen, eine ökologische Lösung ohne den Einsatz von chemischen Reinigungsmitteln zu schaffen. Dank des Entkalkerstabs kann der Verbrauch von Reinigungsmitteln um bis zu 90 Prozent reduziert werden, was einen erheblichen Beitrag zur Schonung unserer Umwelt leistet.

Unsere Entkalkerstäbe zeichnen sich durch Langlebigkeit aus und sind resistent gegen Hitze und bakteriellen Befall. 
Unsere Produkte sind frei von Schwermetallen sowie schädlichen und krebserregenden Inhaltsstoffen.

Der mineralische Stab besteht aus einer Acrylbindung und natürlichen Mineralien im Verhältnis von etwa einem Drittel Acryl zu zwei Dritteln natürlichen Mineralien. Unser Engagement für sichere und umweltbewusste Herstellungsverfahren spiegelt sich in jedem Entkalkerstab wider.
 Unsere Entkalkerstäbe werden in der Schweiz hergestellt.
 Wir optimieren kontinuierlich unsere Produktionsprozesse und Technologien, um Abfall zu minimieren. Dabei werden Fehlproduktionen und Reststücke wiederverwendet, um neue Produkte zu schaffen.
 Unser Engagement zielt darauf ab, die Verpackung zu minimieren und, wenn möglich, wieder verwendbar zu gestalten. Darüber hinaus setzen wir auf Recycling und Abfallverbrennung mit Energierückgewinnung.

Name: Shabondama Soap Co., Ltd.

In the early 1970s, our transition to producing exclusively additive-free soaps marked a defining moment in our history. This shift was driven by our commitment to safeguarding the ecosystem and protecting our users' health, a commitment inspired by our former president’s personal testament to the benefits of natural additive-free products.

Today, Shabondama Soap remains a leader in eco-conscious living, continually advancing with innovative products like our groundbreaking soap-based fire extinguishing agent, Shabondama Natural Foam. This latest invention represents a leap forward in safety solutions, maintaining our legacy of environmental stewardship while broadening our impact.

Join us as we continue to innovate and lead in sustainable practices, ensuring a healthier planet and a safer future for all.

Name: Banyar Jagun Pty Ltd
Description:
Banyar Jagun is an esteemed enterprise owned and operated by First Nations, specialising in the distribution of premium Natural Cleaning, Hygiene, and Personal Care merchandise. Our comprehensive product range is renowned for its eco-friendliness, non-toxic composition, and absence of alcohol. Extensive scientific testing has confirmed their exceptional efficacy, eliminating an impressive 99.9999% of viruses, germs, and bacteria, including the highly contagious COVID-19 strain. This statistical representation serves as a testament to the rigorous laboratory evaluation, where a sample of one million pathogens was examined, highlighting the percentage reduction achieved.

To provide a simplified explanation, a typical sanitiser, disinfectant, or bleach with a 99.9% efficacy rate would leave behind 1,000 pathogens from an initial one million count. In comparison, a 99.99% effectiveness would result in 100 remaining germs, while a 99.999% success rate would leave just 10 germs. Banyar's exceptional solution surpasses industry standards, achieving a remarkable 99.9999% efficiency, leaving a mere count of one germ.
It is essential for individuals to gain a comprehensive understanding of the products they employ and ascertain their suitability for the intended purpose. Through regular conversations with clients, I have observed a prevalent lack of awareness regarding the significance of the 99.9999% statistic. This presents a valuable opportunity for me to educate and enlighten customers, fostering a deeper understanding of the cleaning solutions they employ within their homes, around their loved ones, or in childcare settings. I am continually astounded by the prevalence of misleading marketing tactics and deceptive labels employed by various products on the market. It is crucial to examine the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) accompanying a product, allowing me to educate clients on its merits and hidden hazards.

- Nachhaltigkeit: Wir setzen auf umweltfreundliche Inhaltsstoffe und Praktiken, ohne die Wirksamkeit zu beeinträchtigen.

Mit STRÖDER haben Sie einen Partner an Ihrer Seite, der Sie bei der Entwicklung und Herstellung von Reinigungsprodukten unterstützt und Ihnen hilft, Ihre eigene Produktlinie aufzubauen. Wir sorgen dafür, dass Ihre Produkte nicht nur Ihre Kunden überzeugen, sondern auch die Umwelt schonen.

Name: Santto BioChemical
Description:
Porque somos diferentes!

Ofrecemos productos de limpieza profesionales fabricados bajo el concepto de limpieza sostenible. Nuestros productos no solo eliminan la suciedad y tratan las superficies de forma rápida y eficiente, sino que también protegen la salud de los operarios y promueven la conservación del agua y la biodegradabilidad de los residuos generados.
La industria prospera ante los desafíos. Diversas necesidades, desde las más urgentes hasta las más superfluas, se analizan a diario con los microscopios más modernos, y los datos recopilados son procesados por las mentes más especializadas. Se erigen estructuras gigantescas con el único propósito de encontrar respuestas y soluciones a nuestros obstáculos. Creemos en ir más allá de lo obvio, más allá de lo ya existente, y en centrarnos en las necesidades reales. Desde una perspectiva diferente, nos damos cuenta de que el estándar a veces permanece inalterado simplemente porque no ha sido cuestionado; nos damos cuenta de que las respuestas a las preguntas más complejas se esconden en el contenido de las respuestas más simples. En un mundo donde nada se crea ni nada se pierde, la transformación es cuestión de aplicación. Fue con este enfoque en la innovación y la calidad que surgió la idea de desarrollar productos ecológicos. Nuestros clientes pueden cuidar y mantener la limpieza de sus negocios, hogares y vehículos sin dañar el medio ambiente ni la salud humana, contribuyendo así a un mundo más sostenible. Además de desarrollar el concepto, somos líderes del mercado en este campo. Difundimos ideas, prácticas y contenido que enorgullecen a nuestros clientes y empleados, ya que suministramos al mercado productos y soluciones que generan resultados consistentes y comprobados con un impacto en tres dimensiones: económica, social y ambiental.

Name: Basically Soap
Description:
Basically Soap is owned and operated by a chemist with a deep passion for the art and science of soap making, specializing in handcrafted soaps made with all-natural, eco-friendly ingredients. Rooted in sustainable beauty, Basically Soap carefully sources organic essential oils, natural colorants, and high-quality botanicals to create skin-nourishing products that balance performance, aesthetics, and integrity. Our work blends creativity with precision, ensuring every bar reflects both scientific care and thoughtful design.
Beyond product creation, we offer hands-on soap making classes and workshops designed for organizations, businesses, and community groups seeking meaningful, engaging experiences. These sessions are well-suited for team-building activities, employee wellness programs, diversity and inclusion initiatives, and creative group experiences, providing participants with a collaborative, educational, and enjoyable way to connect while learning a practical skill.
Basically Soap also partner with businesses through wholesale, private label, and white label manufacturing, supporting brands that want high-quality, responsibly made soap products without compromising on values or attention to detail. Whether developing custom formulations or scalable product lines, I bring a structured, quality-driven approach to every collaboration.
Through small-batch production and intentional teaching, my goal is to make handcrafted skincare and creative learning accessible, purposeful, and impactful—while supporting organizations and brands that value quality, sustainability, and community connection.

Name: MEVA KİMYA
Description:
Meva Kimya, 2015 yılının Eylül ayında bir fikir olarak ortaya çıkıp 2022 yılının Eylül ayında çerçevesi ve şartları oluşmaya başlayan ve geçmişten aldığı sinerjiyle beraber Endüstriyel ve Evsel Temizlik Ürünleri Sektöründe yenilikçi bir bakış açısıyla, çevreye ve suya duyarlı aktifler ile daha az kullanımda daha fazla performans elde etmeyi amaçlayan ve bunu kendine hedef belirleyen bir genç girişim şirketidir. Firma doğayı ve suyu koruyarak sektörde ki rakiplerinden farklı bir bakış açısıyla hizmet etmeyi düstur edinmiştir. 

Her zaman yenilikçi, ileri görüşlü, büyük fotoğrafın tamamını görmeye çalışan, donanım kanadıyla birlikte vicdani sorumluluk kanadını da geliştirmeye çalışan çift kanatlı bir firma olma arzumuz ile her yıl kazancımızın % 2,5'luk kısmını yer yüzündeki suların korunması ve geleceğe yaşanılabilir bir doğa bırakabilme amacıyla yapılan projelere hibe etmek en anlamlı hayalimizdir.

Temizlik Ürünlerinin en fazla kullanıldığı endüstriyel tesisler için geliştirilmiş yeni nesil aktifler ile üretilen ürünlerimiz bu anlamlı hayale destek olacak en güçlü ortaklarımızdır.

Together, we can lead the way toward a cleaner, greener future.

Name: Ecopods
Description:
Small Pods. Big Difference. 
Krachtig, Ecologisch en Eenvoudig schoonmaken met wateroplosbare capsules. 

Onze kleine capsules maken een groot verschil
Wij bij Ecopods geloven erin dat we met onze kleine capsules een groot verschil kunnen maken. We vinden het niet enkel belangrijk dat onze producten uitzonderlijk goed schoonmaken, maar willen ook dat jij ze met een glimlach kan gebruiken én dat we goed doen voor onze aarde. Voor minder gaan we niet!

Evenwicht tussen mens en milieu
Onze visie berust op de recent gedefinieerd levensstijl ‘Blue Sustainability’, wat concreet vertaald kan worden naar een evenwicht vinden tussen milieu én menselijke aspecten als gezondheid en welzijn. Door onze onverdeelde inzet voor zowel moeder natuur als verantwoord poetsplezier, slagen we erin modern schoonmaken tot bij jou te brengen. Dit is hoe Ecopods het verschil maakt.

Krachtig schoonmaken
Wie schoonmaakt, doet dit graag zo goed mogelijk. En daar helpen we je graag bij! Onze capsules zijn echte krachtpatsers en maken uitzonderlijk goed schoon. Wist je dat Ecopods haar oorsprong kent in het professioneel schoonmaken? Resultaat gegarandeerd! 

Ecologisch schoonmaken
Het spreekt voor zich dat ecologie vandaag niet meer weg te denken is. Als bewoners van deze mooie planeet zijn we dit ook aan onszelf verplicht. Daarom maken we onze producten en hun gebruik zo ecologisch mogelijk! Wij gaan 100% voor zero-waste. Hervul onze stijlvolle verstuivers met kraantjeswater en beperk zo plastic afval tot een minimum. Bovendien bestaan onze ecologische capsules uit natuurlijke ingrediënten en lossen ze volledig op in water.

Eenvoudig schoonmaken
Daarnaast zorgen we ervoor dat je met onze capsules heel wat tijd én plaats wint. Vertrouw op een perfecte zeepdosering en ga van start in een handomdraai! Met slechts 4 soorten capsules – handig te onderscheiden door een kleurcode – maak je je hele huis of kantoor perfect schoon. Onze capsules zijn zacht, veilig in gebruik en bergen eenvoudig op.

Eh oui chez Paulette, on n’a pas inventé l’eau chaude (quoique…), mais on sait une chose : Il faut respecter la planète et préserver l’environnement ! Et on s’y emploie !

 La plupart des produits de Paulette sont pensés et fabriqués près de Besançon, avec un savoir-faire aux p’tits oignons. 
 Nos matières premières, emballages, étiquettes et parfums sont sourcés auprès de fournisseurs français ou européens. 
 Nos formules à base d’ingrédients d’origine naturelle mettent à l’honneur des matières premières connues et reconnues, utilisées depuis plusieurs décennies comme l’alcool ménager, le savon noir, le bicarbonate, le vinaigre ménager… Paulette le dit : les ingrédients d’antan ont encore de l’avenir ! 
Et tout ça, labellisé ECOCERT ! Ça veut dire tout simplement qu’au moins 95 % des ingrédients de chaque formule sont d’origine naturelle, sans OGM, sans colorant, sans parabène et sans parfum de synthèse ! Si ça, ce n’est pas du bon sens !

Mais attention, on ne fait pas que dépoussiérer les meubles, on dépoussière aussi le rayon entretien ! Paulette, c’est une marque qui ne passe pas inaperçue : une identité forte, une communauté engagée et une grand-mère malicieuse en porte-parole, jamais avare de bons conseils pour un ménage super efficace et de bonnes recettes pour ses p’tits grumeaux fan de DIY !

 Consommateurs, distributeurs, curieux de passage… Bienvenue chez Paulette !

Name: Janjil Pty Ltd
Description:
Our Name
The name Janjil is a Kuku Yalanji word meaning "to clean" or "to wash." It is more than just a word  to us; it is a profound connection to the land we operate on and a timeless principle we uphold. We are a company deeply proud of our Aboriginal heritage, and it is from this ancient and enduring culture that we draw inspiration for our values: respect for the land, commitment to community, and the pursuit of lasting quality.

Our identity is woven into everything we do, reminding us that our responsibility extends beyond simply providing products to fostering a healthier environment for all Australians.


Our Mission
To empower Australia's largest enterprises with high-performance, reliable cleaning solutions that are safe for people, effective for industry, and respectful of the planet. We are committed to leading the shift towards sustainable commercial cleaning by providing products that are as kind to the environment as they are tough on grime.


Our Story
Janjil was founded on a simple but powerful belief: Australian businesses deserve access to the highest quality industrial cleaning products, made right here at home. We saw a gap in the market for solutions that combined uncompromising efficacy with environmental responsibility, all backed by the reliability that large-scale commercial operations demand.

Rejecting the "one-size-fits-all" approach of imported alternatives, we invested in local research, development, and manufacturing. Every Janjil product is formulated and produced in Australia, supporting local jobs and ensuring stringent quality control from the lab to the loading dock. When you choose Janjil, you are investing in Australian ingenuity and excellence.

Mais les empoisonneurs (fabricants) continuent inexorablement à utiliser des  toxiques sans que le consommateur, par méconnaissance ou tabou, ne soit réellement informé. A grand coup de publicités aussi ridicules les unes que les autres, la destruction continue. Polluer tout en lavant, n'est-ce pas là une aberration?

Met Suifer kiest u voor een merk dat verantwoordelijkheid neemt. Voor de mensen die elke dag schoonmaken. Voor de plekken waar zij werken. En voor de wereld die we samen schoon willen houden.

Suifer. Schoon, zoals het is bedoeld.

Name: GenialGem Eco Detergenti Professionali
Description:
GenialGem EcoDetergenti Professionali opera nel settore detergenza professionale. 
I prodotti sono realizzati con estratti e derivati vegetali (Aloe Vera, Menta, Rosmarino, Salvia, Lavanda, Calendula, Tiglio, Timo, Valeriana, Amamelide) selezionati per il loro potere detergente, sgrassante, igienizzante e dedorante. 
Sono adatti per tutte le superfici ed eliminano lo sporco più difficile.

Per perfezionare le formule, Geniale Gem, si avvale di un'innovativa tecnologia fluida ecologica, unica nel suo genere a livello internazionale.
I formulati sono dotati di spiccate qualità chimico-fisiche, senza controindicazioni o pericolosità per uomo e ambiente, con elevato potere pulente su superfici e tessuti lavabili. La composizione equilibrata rimuove lo sporco fino a renderlo solubile in acqua, rispettando materiali e metalli sensibili.
La speciale formulazione è indicata per disgregare ed eliminare tutti i cattivi odori.
I prodotti GENIALGEM hanno caratteristiche (H.A.C.C.P.) per essere utilizzati in Attività Professionali. 
Ciascun prodotto segue i criteri di Eco Sostenibilità nella tutela di Salute Ambiente e Persone: sono senza coloranti, senza fosfati, acidi e solventi VOC, hanno un PH neutro, sono biodegradabili, ipoallergenici, senza simboli di pericolosità e zero tossicità. Si possono ordinare in flaconi da 750 ml, 1 litro, 1 kg, 1,5 - 3 kg e sfusi in taniche da 5, 10, 20 litri.

Description:
Luna has different meanings and is from the Latin word for Moon.

One of the traditions in the community I grew up in centered around the harmony with a woman’s moon cycles- celebrated as a restoration and rebirthing of the family.

My childhood includes a center place of gathering – under a huge pecan tree- gathering as a family to talk and laugh, gathering with friends for a visit, learning about my great grandmothers- Blanchie – who served her community as a wet nurse and healer. Bertha- who lived in the NC Mountains, enduring hardships, but leaning on her ability to produce her own food, my grandmother’s - who worked outside the home, but also used their hands creatively to can food, make clothing for their children, while enduring the hardships of the 30’s and 40’s.

My grandfather’s worked quietly in the background fighting for the right to vote, to own property, to belong equally. My Aunts, Uncles, cousins still to this day provide insight with their wonderful stories of family games, jokes, and just share memories.

The Luna Tree is based on fond memories of the simple life- of family life- supporting and encouraging one another.

This is my way of recognizing the connections that I have shared as a child and now as an adult, engaging in the communities that have a characteristic in common- “knowing your people.”

A feeling of fellowship with others, sharing common attitudes, interests, and goals. Providing products that are made by hand, all for the love of community.

Name: Akayia Nature
Description:
Je suis la fondatrice d’Akayia Nature, une marque alsacienne spécialisée dans la co-création de soins adaptés aux conditions de travail.

J’accompagne les entreprises qui souhaitent mettre en place des actions de Qualité de Vie au Travail (QVT) concrètes, utiles et durables, en partant des besoins réels des salariés.

Mon approche

Je suis convaincue que le bien-être au travail passe aussi par des solutions de soin pensées pour le terrain, et non par des produits standards choisis sur catalogue.

Chaque environnement professionnel impose des contraintes spécifiques :
lavages fréquents, port d’équipements, frottements, conditions climatiques, transpiration, stress…
Mon rôle est de transformer ces contraintes en solutions de soin adaptées.

Mon expertise

Formulation cosmétique professionnelle

Soins sans eau, concentrés en actifs

Analyse des usages et contraintes terrain

Sélection d’ingrédients adaptés aux besoins identifiés

Phases de tests en conditions réelles

Accompagnement réglementaire (toxicologie, conformité, CPNP)

Ce que je propose aux entreprises

Ateliers et team building autour de la formulation cosmétique

Projets de co-création de soins sur mesure avec les équipes

Un accompagnement complet : de l’expression du besoin jusqu’au produit final conforme et utilisable en entreprise

Les produits co-créés peuvent inclure, selon les contextes de travail :
soins mains, baumes corps, soins barrière, shampoings solides, soins lavants ou multi-usages.

Mon objectif

Permettre aux entreprises de déployer une démarche QVT crédible, incarnée et utile, en impliquant les salariés dans la création de solutions qui répondent réellement à leur quotidien.

Akayia Nature, ce ne sont pas simplement des cosmétiques.
Ce sont des solutions de soin co-construites avec les équipes, pensées pour leurs conditions réelles de travail.

Name: Blue Power Group Ltd.
Description:
Blue Power was founded in 2001 by Dr. Dhiru Tanna and other leading business partners including Antony Hart C.D., Mark Hart, Jane Fray, Peter Millingen, and Kenneth Benjamin C.D. after previously coming together to start Lumber Depot in 1998. On recognizing that Jamaica is a large consumer of cake laundry soap the Lumber Depot founders made a strategic decision to begin a small laundry soap manufacturing operation at its premises at Victoria Avenue which was at the time being used as the Lumber Depot head office as well as storage facility for imported lumber.

After initially trading as a separate legal entity called Blue Power Limited which was later merged in April 2010 with Lumber Depot to form what we know today as the Blue Power Group Limited. Years of innovations and resilience against the challenges that come with every great feat, the Blue Power Group has since grown to be the largest manufacturer of bar soaps in Jamaica, it was the second listed company on the JSE Junior Stock Exchange. Now separated from Lumber Depot, Blue Power Group Limited focuses primarily on soap manufacturing for both in-house and third party brands and as the journey continues we can only promise to forge forth with all the principles we held since the beginning; consistency, great customer service and keen attention to detail.

Name: Semorin
Description:
Prazer, somos a Semorin, uma empresa 100% brasileira, formada e dirigida por pessoas que acreditam no poder da inovação.

Iniciamos nossa trajetória no ano de 1965, com o propósito de facilitar a vida e a limpeza de roupas e tecidos através de produtos de alto desempenho. 

Desde cedo, alcançamos o posto de líder no segmento de tira manchas e tira ferrugem, o que nos permitiu inflar o portfólio de produtos e explorar novos segmentos ao longo dos anos. 

Com isso, passamos a distribuir, além de soluções para os tecidos, produtos para a limpeza do lar através das marcas: BYTS, Mimo e Icaraí.

Este movimento, além de resultar em mais praticidade, qualidade e agilidade para os lares brasileiros, nos permitiu também passar adiante o zelo e valorização do carinho e demais aspectos emocionais presentes no ato de limpar a casa e as roupas, cultivado e nutrido por todo o nosso time.

Estamos sempre à procura da inovação, tanto na formulação, quanto nos métodos de fabricação e distribuição, atentos também à proteção ao meio ambiente, à saúde dos consumidores e respeito às normas vigentes.

Em retrospectiva, nossa trajetória é marcada por um legado de excelência, que é diariamente revisitado e cultivado a partir de novas estratégias mercadológicas, de marketing e logísticas, fazendo com que as criações da nossa casa façam parte da sua.

The product range includes eco-friendly cleaning agents, concentrated cleaning solutions in various formulas, surface disinfectants, degreasers, industrial cleaners, sanitizing solutions for the food industry, odor eliminators, floor care products such as polish and cleaners, eco-formulated hand sanitizers, and specialized cleaners for machinery and equipment. These products are available in several formats, including liquid concentrates with various concentrations, ready-to-use liquids, eco-friendly wipes, dissolvable tablets or powder concentrates, spray bottles, bulk packaging such as barrels and drums, refillable containers, and reusable dispensing systems.

Focused on B2B sales, the company delivers customized solutions designed to meet the highest standards of each client, ensuring both efficiency and environmental responsibility.

Name: Atlas Commodities Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Atlas Commodities Pvt. Ltd., a dream turned reality by three brothers, has become a hallmark of cleanliness and sanitation in India. Our journey was initiated by Milind Ankolekar, who harnessed his decade-long pharma experience to revolutionize the cleaning product industry. His brothers, Harshad and Hemant, joined the venture, their combined intellect and determination fueling the company's growth.

Our initial aim was to make a significant impact in the marketing and distribution sector, leveraging our pharma sales background. For us, quality is paramount, and we strive for excellence in every product we create.

In 2006, we expanded our horizons and began manufacturing our own products. Our combined experience led to a deep understanding of the products ACPL is now renowned for. We prioritized sourcing top-quality raw materials from the best manufacturers and established a rigorous quality control system to ensure excellence.

We aim to offer high-quality products at competitive prices. Our team is customer-centric, working diligently to remain the preferred choice for our loyal customers. We believe in going the extra mile to ensure customer satisfaction.

After 16 years, ACPL has become the go-to solution for all cleaning needs in India. Our wide range of products, including floor cleaners, toilet cleaners, dish wash, air fresheners, sanitary cubes, glass cleaners, drain cleaners, flush tabs, multipurpose cleaners, and naphthalene balls, are sought after in supermarkets across the country. Moreover, large FMCG companies trust ACPL for private label manufacturing.

With ACPL, you have 30 years of dedication and expertise at your disposal. Our products, available in supermarkets and online platforms, guarantee satisfaction, safety, and effectiveness. We are proud to have a current group turnover exceeding 550 million Indian rupees. Choose ACPL, where we don't just manufacture products, we build trust and ensure a cleaner, healthier future.

• Certified Safe and Non-toxic. Our products are safe to use around children, babies and pets.

• Our products really work! Our products perform better than their toxic alternatives thanks to our plant-based ingredients. Our spray cleaners are independently lab-tested and proven to kill 99.9% of germs and bacteria.

• Our bottles are made from 100 % recycled and recyclable rPet. Refills, Concentrates and Apothecary Glass bottles are also available. 
• A beautiful experience. Thanks to the high concentrations of Australian essential oils, the aromatherapy benefits of our products can transform cleaning from a mundane task into a sensorial and uplifting ritual.
• We have attracted a base of devotees with an Instagram following of more than 100,000 followers, thousands of 5-star ratings from 99% of our consumers and exceptional loyalty. 
• Purpose-led. Driven by a growing body of evidence on Ecopsychology and the importance of maintaining a regular connection to nature for well-being, our brand’s mission is to support this connection by bringing more nature into people’s daily lives, both through the beauty of our plant-based range, and via the support of community initiatives #naturepact and the Critters Program.

Name: Getting Clean
Description: Getting Clean is a community project which supports people in drug and alcohol recovery by giving them a purpose and opportunity to help other people and our planet. We aim to educate and inspire all members of the community to lead cleaner and more sustainable lifestyles – whether that means recycling waste or abstinence from substances. Name: SneakerWash
Description:
Sneaker reinigen macht keinen Spaß.

Seit drei Jahren befassen wir uns intensiv mit der Reinigung von Schuhen. Wir haben herausgefunden, dass jede zweite Person ihre Schuhe bereits in der Waschmaschine wäscht. 

Doch Schuhe ungeschützt in die Waschmaschine zu geben, ist auf Dauer keine ideale Lösung. Die Schuhe leiden unter der mechanischen Belastung und die Waschtrommel kann durch die ungedämpften Stöße Schaden nehmen. Immerhin wiegt ein nasses Paar Schuhe oft mehr als zwei Kilo. Hinzu kommt die nervige Geräuschkulisse.

Mit der jahrelangen Erfahrung aus der Entwicklung von Waschmaschinen und durch unzählige Waschtests haben wir schließlich eine Lösung entwickelt, mit der du deine Sneaker schonend sauber bekommst: SneakerWash.

Name: Onda Eco Limpeza Ecológica
Description:
Deixa a gente se apresentar: Nós somos a Onda Eco
Mais que uma marca de  produtos de limpeza ecológicos, somos um  movimento. Fazer eco é fazer ecologia. Fazer eco é fazer economia. E fazer eco é, principalmente, fazer a diferença ao levar ideias do bem para mais e mais pessoas. Isso porque só quem acredita que pode mudar o mundo para melhor é que realmente o faz.

Nossos produtos são produzidos 100% a partir de ingredientes naturais e biodegradáveis – saudáveis para você e para o planeta. Além disso, as nossas embalagens  são feitas  de  plástico reciclado, retirado do litoral e dos oceanos.  A gente acredita  que a Onda é cuidar de casa. Da sua. E da casa de todos nós. Com nossos produtos você limpa sua casa, sem sujar o  planeta. Sua família,  seus filhos  e  bichinhos de  estimação certamente vão sentir a diferença e você, vai fazer a diferença. A Onda Eco acredita  na  conscientiz.ação  – ao  mesmo tempo em que explica o impacto,  oferece e promove soluções. Somos sobre consciência, mas sobretudo sobre ação. Do poder público, das pessoas e das empresas. Por isso,  além de uma marca de produtos de limpeza ecológica, somos uma plataforma  de sustentabilidade e  comunicação para pequenas, médias   e grandes empresas interessadas em um futuro mais sustentável e responsável.

E aí, que tal entrar na Onda e fazer Eco com a gente?

Een revolutie in schoonmaken met duurzame ozonwatertechnologie. Nos engagements : l’efficacité et le prix. Le changement doit se faire sans renier sur la qualité ni couter plus cher.

UMA HISTÓRIA DE DEDICAÇÃO, INOVAÇÃO E SUPERAÇÃO!

Uma jornada empresarial que une comprometimento, inovação e superação. Essa é a saga de Carlos Colombo Filho, que teve início no interior de São Paulo em 1980, ano em que ele percebeu que podia não só atuar como representante comercial, mas ir além e criar sua própria empresa de produtos de higiene e limpeza.

Em 2008, um novo capítulo dessa história começou. Após muitos anos de experiência e avaliação constante do mercado, o Sr. Carlos e sua esposa, Sra. Rosane, alcançaram o produto desejado: Lava Roupas em Pó Ápyce - perfume intenso, qualidade e um ótimo custo benefício.

Desde então, a Ápyce cresceu e se tornou referência no segmento de lava roupas em pó, inclusive através da produção de inúmeras marcas terceirizadas.

Atualmente, a Ápyce vem se consolidando em todo Brasil com o compromisso diário de fornecer produtos que não só limpam, mas também elevam a experiência de cuidado com as roupas. A qualidade é prioridade, sempre guiada pela paixão e pelo compromisso de oferecer para o mercado uma solução de preço justo.

Name: Eurosan Ecotime
Description:
Eurosan Ecotime grupacija je lider u Bosni i Hercegovini na polju profesionalne higijene i usluga čišćenja.

Naša priča počinje 1998. godine u Mostaru, kada se u jednom malom kafiću rodila ideja koja će ubrzo postati uspješan i respektabilan obiteljski biznis.

Počevši od suradnje s firmom Kimberly-Clark, kroz posljednjih 26 godina uspjeli smo ostvariti zastupništvo u BiH za renomirane dobavljače i proizvođače profesionalne opreme i sredstava za čišćenje, uključujući:

•	Diversey
•	Tork
•	TTS
•	Satino by WEPA
•	i mnoge druge.

Kroz posljednjih 8 godina proširili smo našu ponudu na sektor zaštitne i radne opreme, stječući zastupništvo za tvrtke poput:

•	DeltaPlus
•	Tesa
•	Lacuna.

Također, nudimo opremu za serviranje stolova u kafićima i restoranima, zastupajući renomirane brendove poput SETI i Fato. Osim toga, pružamo i visokokvalitetnu hotelsku kozmetiku od uglednih proizvođača GFL i CAHM, osiguravajući bogat asortiman za vaše potrebe u ugostiteljstvu.

Proširivši poslovanje u Sarajevo i Banja Luku, naša kompanija uspješno pokriva većinu teritorija u Bosni i Hercegovini, a naš iskusni prodajni tim uvijek je spreman odgovoriti na sva vaša pitanja i nedoumice.

Dugogodišnji rad i napredak omogućili su nam da postanemo lideri u industriji. Uvijek se trudimo biti u korak s vremenom i pružiti rješenja za sve izazove s kojima se možete suočiti. Naša sveobuhvatna ponuda čini nas idealnim partnerom koji će Vam omogućiti da pronađete sve što Vam je potrebno na jednom mjestu.

Želite li saznati više o tome kako možemo unaprijediti vašu higijenu, zaštitu na radu ili opremu za vaš poslovni prostor? Kontaktirajte nas putem e-maila na info@eurosan.ba ili nas direktno pozovite na +387 36 342 220. Radujemo se prilici da vam pomognemo u postizanju izvrsnosti!

Name: Fèlix Giralt broom factory
Description:
Certified as a centenary company by the Chamber of Commerce of Barcelona, the company started its activity dedicated to the Straw.
On the twenties of the last century the company was redirected to the broom manufacturing, using local palm leafs and canes obtained from the banks of the nearby streams as raw materials.
Later on, other raw materials, such as corn and different plastic compounds, were incorporated to the broom manufacturing process and also the handles were updated using wood and metals (iron and aluminum) following the trends in the sector. 
Currently, the company has divided its activity into two main areas: the road sweeping sector, with a fast and effective service, and the traditional home and industrial sector, where our company acts as a cost-effective manufacturer for suppliers and distributors of cleaning products.

The aim of road sweeping division of the company is to give a complete solution to the responsible for the road sweeping and gardening service of the public sector.
Currently giving a direct fast and effective service to the main contractors of road sweeping services as well as many city councils in Spain, we are working to find partners to cooperate to supply our own manufactured products abroad.

Name: FUWA BIOTECH Europe GmbH
Description:
FUWA BIOTECH Europe GmbH – Nachhaltige Reinigung neu gedacht

FUWA steht für eine neue Generation von Reinigungsmitteln: biologisch abbaubar, pflanzenbasiert und hergestellt aus Reststoffen. Unser Schlüsselwirkstoff sind fermentierte Enzyme aus Ananasschalen – einem Nebenprodukt der Lebensmittelverarbeitung, das in klassischen Produktionsketten als Abfall gilt. FUWA verwandelt diesen „Abfall“ in eine Ressource und zeigt, wie moderne Kreislaufwirtschaft konkret funktioniert.

Unsere Reinigungsprodukte sind hochwirksam, aber sanft – zu Mensch, Tier und Umwelt. Wir verzichten bewusst auf bedenkliche Inhaltsstoffe wie SLES und Mikroplastik und setzen auf Natur, Biotechnologie und verantwortungsvolle Entwicklung.

Was FUWA einzigartig macht:

Upcycling statt Wegwerfen: Wir nutzen das, was andere entsorgen – und schaffen daraus wirksame Reinigungsmittel.

Biotechnologische Innovation: Fermentierte Enzyme sorgen für kraftvolle Reinigung auf ökologischer Basis.
Transparenz & Partnerschaft: Wir arbeiten offen mit unseren Produzenten, Partnern und Händlern zusammen – vom Ursprung bis ins Regal.

FUWA BIOTECH Europe GmbH ist die exklusive Vertriebsgesellschaft für den europäischen Markt. Unser Ziel ist es, echte ökologische Alternativen im Alltag zugänglich zu machen – für Haushalte, Handel, Gastronomie und Gewerbe.

Natürlich sauber – mit Wirkung und Verantwortung.

Name: shiffter
Description:
Does anyone enjoy cleaning the toilet with a toilet brush? Without being too graphic, it’s a messy and unpleasant experience… and the sight of a used toilet brush sat next to the toilet can stay in your memory, for all the wrong reasons. 

Even expensive, designer toilet brushes have the same issues. This is where the shiffter comes in. Essentially it’s a patented jet wash for the toilet, which means it is cleaner to use than a regular or even a hygienic toilet brush, because it doesn’t come into contact with the bowl. It also has environmental and social benefits with profits going to related good causes such as sanitation, crohns, colitis and IBS support.

It’s a specially designed, squeezable bottle, which you fill with water and leave next to your toilet. After you’ve… how can we put this… got up from your seat, flushed and realised that the toilet bowl is still a little messy, instead of grabbing a toilet brush and chemicals, or flushing repeatedly, you simply point the Shiffter at the toilet bowl and give it a squeeze. This releases a controllable jet of water to wash the toilet clean. It’s a simple idea but it works – and let’s face it – many of the best ideas are simple!

Description:
**Profil Perusahaan: PT Gudang Sabun Sukses**

PT Gudang Sabun Sukses adalah perusahaan terkemuka yang bergerak dalam bidang pengolahan dan distribusi aneka produk pembersih untuk kebutuhan rumah dan kantor. Dengan fokus pada produk pembersih pakaian dan cuci piring, PT Gudang Sabun Sukses menyediakan solusi berkualitas tinggi yang memenuhi kebutuhan pelanggan sehari-hari.

**Produk dan Layanan:**

1. **Pembersih Pakaian:** PT Gudang Sabun Sukses menghadirkan berbagai produk pembersih pakaian dalam berbagai kemasan, mulai dari ukuran 1 liter hingga 5 liter. Produk-produk ini dirancang untuk membersihkan dan merawat pakaian Anda dengan efektif. Dengan berbagai formula yang tersedia, pelanggan memiliki banyak pilihan sesuai dengan preferensi mereka.

2. **Pembersih Cuci Piring:** Selain produk pakaian, PT Gudang Sabun Sukses juga menawarkan pembersih cuci piring berkualitas tinggi. Produk ini diformulasikan khusus untuk membersihkan peralatan makan dan masak dengan cepat dan efisien.

3. **Paket Bibit Deterjen Cair Pembersih Pakaian dan Sabun Cair Cuci Piring:** Salah satu produk unggulan PT Gudang Sabun Sukses adalah paket bibit deterjen cair pembersih pakaian dan sabun cair cuci piring. Dengan paket ini, pelanggan dapat menghasilkan hingga 5 liter pembersih pakaian atau cuci piring berkualitas tinggi. Keunggulan utama produk ini adalah berat pengiriman yang rendah, hanya sekitar 1 kg, sehingga tidak menimbulkan kekhawatiran biaya pengiriman yang tinggi bagi pelanggan.

**Kualitas dan Keunggulan:**

- **Kualitas Tinggi:** PT Gudang Sabun Sukses selalu berkomitmen untuk memberikan produk berkualitas tinggi kepada pelanggan. Semua produknya diformulasikan dengan bahan-bahan pilihan yang efektif dalam membersihkan dan merawat berbagai permukaan.

- **Inovasi Produk:** Produk unggulan seperti paket bibit deterjen cair pembersih pakaian dan sabun cair cuci piring menunjukkan komitmen PT Gudang Sabun Sukses terhadap inovasi. Produk ini memberikan solusi praktis dan ekonomi

Name: CleanEcoUSA
Description:
Welcome to CleanEcoUSA on LinkedIn, where we are redefining cleanliness with our groundbreaking MediCleanTec steam cleaners. At CleanEcoUSA, our mission transcends beyond just cleaning; we aim to usher in a new era of hygiene and sustainability, making chemical cleaners a thing of the past.

Our MediCleanTec steam cleaners are at the forefront of innovation, harnessing the power of high-temperature steam to eliminate bacteria, viruses, and germs with unmatched efficiency. By producing steam from 179 to 190 degrees Celsius, our machines ensure that multi-resistant germs have no chance of survival, tackling the root cause of bacterial and viral resistance without the use of harmful chemicals.

Why commit to MediCleanTec? The answer lies in our understanding of the limitations of traditional cleaning methods. Chemical cleaning agents not only pose a risk to health and the environment but also compromise the integrity of surfaces over time. Our solution is simple yet revolutionary: a steam cleaning technology that is gentle on surfaces, from marble to textiles, and lethal to pathogens.

Our technology doesn't stop at cleaning. With each MediCleanTec machine comes a commitment to environmental sustainability. The reduction in water usage, elimination of chemical residues, and our CO2-conscious approach underline our dedication to protecting our planet. Our machines are designed for continuous use, ensuring reliability and durability, which in turn reduces waste and encourages a more sustainable cleaning protocol.

MediCleanTec's versatility is unmatched, with color-coded attachments for different cleaning needs, ensuring ease of use and preventing the common pitfalls of chemical cleaning. From glass to kitchen surfaces, each attachment is crafted to deliver optimal cleaning without the risk of damage or cross-contamination.

Moreover, our commitment to innovation is reflected in the inclusion of natural cleaning aids, such as our glass coating spray and copper fiber towe

In addition, we provide private label and contract manufacturing solutions for numerous international brands and retail chains.

With the responsibility and pride of being a third-generation family-owned company, we continue to reach millions of consumers worldwide as one of Türkiye’s leading manufacturers and a truly global player.

Guided by our philosophy of “Think Global, Act Local,” we carry out import, sales, marketing, distribution, and after-sales activities across Russia, the Turkic Republics, North Africa, and West Africa through our local entities: Burhan Rus LLC in Moscow, Burhan Misr Ltd in Egypt, and Burano Nigeria Ltd in Nigeria.

Name: Saponificio Luigi Chizzoni & C. srl
Description:
Fondato nel 1920 da Luigi Chizzoni e gestito oggi dalla quinta generazione della famiglia, il Saponificio Chizzoni produce detersivi alla spina, saponi, detergenti ecologici di elevata qualità e a basso impatto ambientale. 
La produzione interamente made in Italy ha ridotto negli anni l’impiego di plastica fino al 95%, ed è alimentata con energia pulita da fonti rinnovabili grazie all’impianto fotovoltaico installato sul tetto dell’azienda. Si basa sull’impiego di materie prime di origine vegetale da fonti rinnovabili prontamente e rapidamente biodegradabili, per ottenere prodotti a ridotto impatto ambientale, sui quali vengono svolti test dermatologici, Nichel, Cromo e controllati da enti certificatori esterni.
Il Saponificio Chizzoni promuove dal 1995 la vendita dei detersivi alla spina come miglior soluzione per ridurre alla fonte lo spreco di plastica monouso.

- Njësia për pastrimin e objekteve gjenerale si jashtë ashtu edhe brenda (Banesat, zyret ,ndërtesat e ndryshme, objektet e mëdha ,mirëmbajtjen e banesave të sapo ndërtuara etj),
- Njësia për pastrimin e industrive shërbyëse (hotelet , restaurantet , kuzhinat e ndryshme , kafiteritë , furrat ),
- Njësia për pastrimin e xhamave,
- Njesia për pastrimin tepihave,
- Njesia per pastrimin kauqave, karrigeve, foteleve, dysheke-ve.
- Njësia për pastrimin e karrigeve të veturave,
- Njësia për dezinfektim të qerdhëve, kuzhinave, kafiterive,

Name: The Cleaner Soul
Description:
Hello! My name is Amanda Leibowitz, aka the founding Cleaner with Benefits!  Healthy living has always been my thing, especially after becoming a mum. so  you can imagine my shock and disbelief at being diagnosed with breast cancer. In need of some answers, I started re-evaluating every product I’d been using. My disbelief quickly turned to devastation upon learning that I’d been inadvertently subjecting myself and my family to serious, long-term health risks as a result of the harmful, toxic chemicals that were in the cleaning products I used  to clean our home.  Immediately, I trashed everything and started researching a safer alternative. After intensive kitchen experimentation, I created a simple yet effective formula that I then took to a trusted friend and natural biochemist who confirmed it was indeed effective at removing bacteria dirt and grime.

I'm proud to say that the Cleaner Soul's 100% natural, all-purpose cleaners are made with only 5 ingredients that are rated #1 on EWG. They are fragranced with only essential oils so they provide an aromatherapy boost for cognitive benefits, are suitable for any surface that can get wet, and are truly non-toxic and skin-safe for your entire family, including your fur babies! They arrive to you packaged in recyclable, refillable glass bottles and come in 4 signature aromas that are to live for...  whatever your mood, whatever the mess, we've got you!

What else can I say? I only wanted the best, safest products possible for my family, and I'm so excited to share them with yours!

100% Non-Toxic | Organic Essential Oils | Skin-Safe & Food-Contact Safe Ingredients | Pet-Safe | Baby-Safe | Vegan | PETA Certified | Palm Oil Free | Made in the USA

Name: LaverVert & Savon de Namur
Description:
LaverVert est né suite au constat que la plupart des produits d'entretien étaient nocifs pour la planète, notre santé et celle de nos enfants et qu'il y avait énormément de ressources naturelles et locales qui pourraient nous permettre de proposer des produits ménagers écologiques, efficaces et transparent sur leur composition.
Avec JFA LaverVert nous avons développé un savon noir à l'huile de colza locale que nous avons appelé LE SAVON DE NAMUR que nous fabriquons de façon artisanale.
Parti de cette base, nous avons développé tout une gamme de produit d’entretien LaverVert que nous produisons toujours de façon artisanale dans notre atelier à Maillen.
Nous proposons des solutions simples, abordables et si possible circulaires pour que les particulier et les entreprises puissent utiliser des produits sains, respectueux de l'environnement et leur santé tout en diminuant les déchets plastiques et l’empreinte carbone lié à ce secteur !
Apres avoir étudié, testé, pendant plus de 2 ans la possibilité de valoriser les cendres pour fabriquer de la lessive, nous nous sommes malheureusement rendu compte des limites de cette solution. (Cout environnemental du transport, variation de concentration, soucis d'uniformisation, problème d'approvisionnement, gestion des cendres après extraction) 
Nous avons donc dû nous réinventer, pivoter et c’est la que nous avons eu l’idée de créer un savon noir local à partir duquel nous avons développé toute une gamme de produit d'entretien naturels et transparents sur leurs compositions.

Présents dans de nombreux domaines d’activité, Agriculture, IAA, Automobile et Transports, Hygiène Générale Professionnelle et Grand Public, Nautisme, les produits BIO ATTITUDE sont majoritairement formulés dans le respect du cahier des charges Ecocert «Ecodétergent» et certifiés par Ecocert Greenlife.

Lo que comenzó con la fabricación de jabones artesanales a partir de los restos de producción de aceite de oliva, a día de hoy se ha convertido en una industria innovadora y líder en el sector de suministros de productos de limpieza e higiene para uso profesional.

Nuestra experiencia y dedicación nos han permitido expandirnos al sector HORECA, ofreciendo productos de limpieza, detergentes de uso profesional y soluciones innovadoras para el tratamiento de aguas de consumo y piscinas. Contamos con un equipo técnico especializado que brinda asesoramiento profesional y soluciones a medida para el sector Horeca y de servicios.

En Jabones Puig, seguimos creciendo con la mirada puesta en un futuro sostenible, innovando continuamente para ofrecer productos de alta calidad que respeten el medio ambiente y las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Conoce más sobre nuestra historia, nuestros productos y nuestra visión hacia un futuro más limpio y sostenible!

Name: Re-Wash
Description:
Missie: Het creëren van een duurzame mindset bij ondernemers en consumenten en bijdragen aan het verminderen van het gebruik van grondstoffen.

Visie: Re-Wash staat voor de mindset te veranderen van alle huishoudens en mkb’ers met een vaatwasser in Nederland door vaatwastabletten in een nieuwe, kleinere vorm aan te bieden en zo het gebruik van grondstoffen te reduceren.

Het Re-Wash vaatwastablet wordt gemaakt van biologisch afbreekbare stoffen. Het vaatwastablet zal bekend staan om het verminderen van grondstof verbruik. Door de tablet zo kleinschalig mogelijk te houden met alleen ingrediënten te gebruiken die mee dragen aan een schone vaat. Door de keuze van hoeveel tabletten te gebruiken per vaatwasbeurt ( 1 tablet bij een lichte vaat en 2 tabletten bij een zware vuile vaat) zorgt Re-Wash ervoor dat er minder afvalstoffen in het water terecht komt.

Our mission is simple:
 To create peaceful spaces, naturally clean.

Nama pendiri Caturwangsa Indah adalah : Wong Kang Kuin, yang sekaligus merupakan ayah dari pemiliknya. Kami bermula dari industri rumah tangga kecil yang memproduksi sabun batangan buatan tangan di Tasikmalaya pada tahun 1975,

Das Unternehmen hat sich dem schnellen, umweltneutralen Abbau von Kohlenwasserstoffen verschrieben und definiert mit dem weltweit ersten, patentierten 2-Komponenten-Sauerstoffreiniger 𝐀𝐫𝐯𝐨𝐱 𝐏𝐫𝐨 neue Maßstäbe. Die zwei Komponenten von Arvox Pro setzen aktiven Sauerstoff frei, der Schmutz zersetzt und nur biologisch abbaubare Rückstände hinterlässt – ideal für Fliesen, Stein, Holz und mehr. Ausgezeichnet von TÜV, FiBL und Prüfengel.

 Mehr dazu finden Sie auf unserer Produktseite: https://arvox.cleaning/ 

Im Jahr 2023 wurde Arva Greentech als “Green Innovator des Jahres” in Deutschland prämiert.

Für den privaten Bereich bietet die 𝐓𝐰𝐢𝐧 𝐏𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫-Linie ebenfalls einen hochwirksamen 2-Komponenten-Reiniger, der hartnäckige Verschmutzungen – drinnen und draußen - effektiv entfernt. Auch diese Produkte tragen das Prüfengel-Siegel. Die Twin Power Produkte sind in Deutschland und Österreich in unserem Online-Shop erhältlich.

 Weitere Details finden Sie auf unserer Produktseite: https://twinpower.cleaning/

GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices): In our modern facilities, we produce under GMP standards that keep product safety at the highest level.

Responsible Production: With our Vegan Certificate, we document that we do not use animal-derived ingredients in our products and that we conduct nature-friendly production. Additionally, we also offer products that have a Halal certificate.

Our Innovation and R&D Power

Our expert R&D team, led by chemical engineers, works continuously to develop more effective and eco-friendly formulas. We create maximum-performance products by processing premium-quality imported and domestic raw materials in our modern facilities equipped with advanced technology.

We provide service in every field where cleanliness is important, primarily hotels, restaurants, cafes, hospitals, schools, industrial facilities, and workplaces. Name: Green Goobé Zero Waste Living
Description:
Green Goobé Zero Waste Living is a circular enterprise that helps make an easy switch to safe and zero waste cleaning. 

The brand Green Goobé (pronounced GOO-bay) is a registered trademark owned by NaviluKaadu Eco Roots, the holding company.

We manufacture and market a line of scientifically and thoughtfully formulated, nontoxic and environmentally safe cleaner blends with plant-origin ingredients, natural minerals and an infusion of pure and premium essential oils. Our cleaners have been tested for safety, nontoxicity and biodegradability in NABL-accredited laboratories. And in keeping with our zero waste ethos, they come packaged in repurposed used containers.

SCIENCE, THOUGHTFULNESS, INTEGRITY – these form the basis of our efforts at Green Goobé. That’s why we choose to craft our formulations in-house in small batches, against orders. 

SAFE AND EFFECTIVE CLEANERS: 

We research and labour over every detail. We handpick raw materials — most natural, a few synthetic (because commercially viable quantities of some natural ingredients are unsustainable); with unambiguous environmental and human safety profiles that meet our high standards for quality, performance and sustainability. This makes our cleansers safe for people, pets and the planet.

ZERO WASTE PACKAGING: 

We as a company, have #ExtendedProducerResponsibility ingrained in our DNA. The Green Goobé range of cleaners come packaged in handsome, repurposed, used glass bottles. We ship and deliver larger orders in reused plastic cans. We don’t mind the added workload of sourcing and cleaning these bottles. Reusing them conserves energy and raw material that go into the making of new containers, while keeping these perfectly nice containers in use, and out of the landfill.

Go on. Explore our range of meticulously crafted cleaner blends on our website. Be sure to read through our ingredients page where we list our raw materials and their origins.

Med vår produkt kan användarna enkelt hålla sin arbetsplats och sina händer rena, oavsett var de befinner sig.

Vår målsättning är att göra vardagen enklare för dem som arbetar med bilar och maskiner. Genom att leverera högkvalitativa wipes som är enkla att använda och som fungerar under de mest krävande förhållandena, strävar vi efter att vara en självklar del av verktygslådan hos alla som arbetar inom dessa områden.

Vi på Kero International tror på långsiktiga samarbeten med våra kunder och partners. Vi vill växa tillsammans med dem genom att erbjuda en produkt som inte bara uppfyller utan överträffar förväntningarna. Vår vision för framtiden är att bli en ledande aktör inom rengöringssektorn, med produkter som inte bara riktar sig till mekaniker utan även till en bredare publik som söker effektiva och pålitliga lösningar.

Med ständig utveckling och kundfokus i centrum arbetar vi för att utöka vårt produktsortiment och nå nya marknader, samtidigt som vi fortsätter att leverera kvalitet och värde till våra kunder. Kero International är ett företag att räkna med när det gäller att hålla arbetsytor och verktyg rena på ett snabbt och enkelt sätt.

Name: Contagion Control Solutions
Description:
Providing  HIGH - VOLUME  Sanitizing Solutions for Industry, Schools, Franchises, Prisons, Transportation, Nursing Home Networks, Assisted Living Groups, and Property Management.  

We also specialize in helping all areas of the poultry industry with increasing safety against avian influenza (bird flu) for the chickens and turkeys and other birds all the way to keeping equipment and employees safe due to our non toxic and safe sanitizing solutions. 

Contagion Control Solutions  is  focused the paradigm shift from using  toxic  chemicals  to kill  dangerous  viruses, bacteria,  and fungi to going green by using safe non-toxic all natural products. 

Hypochlorous Acid (HOCL), is a naturally occurring molecule produced by the immune system.  It is highly active against bacterial, viral, and fungal microorganisms.  Moreover, HOCL is active against biofilm and increases oxygenation of a wound site to improve healing.  Natural HOCL is unstable but through technology, it can be stabilized into an effective topical antiseptic agent.


HOCL has been proven to stop Coronavirus in its tracks in 15 seconds!

Visit our website to see the HOCL clinical data.

Our products include hand held foggers, walk through gates, robotic sanitizing equipment and more.

Name: Reset Colombia
Description:
What do we believe in?

We believe that even small individual changes at home can lead to a more conscious and sustainable society. We believe that rethinking our habits is essential to keep the world going. At least with us as part of it.


How do we do it?

We offer cleaning products in the form of effervescent tablets that help you to reduce the need for single-use plastics. For our oceans and a world with less plastic, for a balanced carbon footprint and a more conscious lifestyle.

With these three simple steps you save the planet unnecessary plastic:

1) Fill any bottle with 500ml of water.
2) Insert a tablet.
3) Wait 10 minutes and that's it. You now have a surface cleaner.

Once you finish the product, don't throw the bottle away, reuse the bottle and refill it with our tablets.

Name: Further JanSan
Description:
Let Further JanSan help put your facility waste grease to work. 

At Further JanSan we work with your existing grease hauler to collect the waste grease produced by your property - we use that grease to produce BioDiesel, an alternative fuel that reduces carbon emissions by over 75%. After the fuel is produced we then take the byproduct of the manufacturing process, glycerin, and we use that to make cleaning supplies that are used back at the property where the grease originated.
Full Circle and Fully Sustainable.
Further Jan San is family-owned and Made in the USA.
We provide distribution and maintenance through Waxie/Brady IFS.

Name: Zilch biomagic cleaning
Description:
De kracht van natuurlijk schoonmaken met goede actieve bacteriën

Zilch biomagic cleaning is een nieuw innovatief concept op het gebied van reinigen. Het onderscheid zich op alle vlakken van reguliere schoonmaakmiddelen. Het reinigt effectiever, verdrijft slechte bacteriën dus nare geuren en het maakt woon/werkomgeving gezonder. Zilch biomagic cleaning reinigt waar chemische producten geen effect meer hebben. Zilch is een natuurpoduct. Goed voor mens, dier en milieu.

Schoon en schoner
Zilch pro reinigt in twee stappen. Eerst reinigen zo’n vijfduizend verschillende enzymen het oppervlak waarna geactiveerde bacteriën langdurig vervuiling te lijf gaan. Deze niet-pathogene, dus goede en onschadelijke bacteriën, breken vuil af, nemen het op, delen zich en vormen zo een actieve biofilm waardoor reinigen steeds makkelijk en efficiënter wordt.

Gezonder en effectiever
Zilch pro bevat een overvloed aan actieve goede bacteriën die de overlevingsmogelijkheid van slechte bacteriën langdurig wegneemt. Dit natuurlijke mechanisme is onmogelijk met chemische schoonmaakmiddelen tot stand te brengen. Zilch kan hierdoor veel van de huidige hardnekkige reinigingsproblemen oplossen. Zilch biomagic cleaning is hét reinigingsconcept van de toekomst!

Onze productlijnen:
Zilch biomagic cleaning
Ippo horse cleaning
Ydra boat cleaning
Beatfix vinyl record cleaning

Zilch creëert daarnaast speciale producten op maat voor verschillende specifieke reinigingsvraagstukken. 

100% schoon en 0% milieubelastend

Name: Regent Park Naturals
Description:
I began Regent Park Naturals as an archeologist interested in the identification and traditional application of native perennials. We combine strong tinctures teas and infusions into soaps that I sold at Pittsburgh area farmers markets.
This includes an anti poison ivy soap, made from jewelweed, oatmeal and bentonite clay.  A folk remedy for itchy skin, rashes and bug bites;  this has been a favorite of hikers, bikers, and gardeners alike.
At market we sell soaps unwrapped with a minimum of packaging to reduce waste.  This option is now available online at regentparknaturals.com, where you can get the same great experience of farmers market soap and prices shipped directly to you.  
Pittsburgh is a city where Slavic and eastern European tradition remain strong, especially with those of Polish ancestry.  Regent Park Naturals has created several gift soaps associated as such, including Pierogi on a Rope;  which is handmade in novelty polish pierogi gift soap form. 
In creating the pierogi soap, sold at pierogionarope.com we also stumbled upon the miracle of cabbage.  In soap cabbage imparts its anti inflammatory properties.  we combine this with oatmeal for a what we call a traditional cabbage soap; including "the Aloe of Carpathia"
If you are unsure, you are encouraged to try our number one farmers market seller, odds and ends soap.  This includes miscuts, misfits, miscolored, and more.  Not so great looking, but equally great soap with tremendous lather.
