Name: AIRRX INC
Description: AirRX was created by Gad Amith because of the issues caused by COVID-19 in workplaces. Air and surface cleaning products were created based on Chlorine dioxide, which is safe and effective. The team behind AirRX includes experts in emergency medical services, hazardous material response teams, and industrial hygiene. The COVID-19 pandemic led to policies like lockdowns, mandatory mask-wearing, testing mandates, and vaccine mandates, which some people didn't like. AirRX found that commercially available chlorine dioxide gas products were effective in reducing COVID-19 viral loads on surfaces and face masks. The Center for Environmental/Occupational Risk Analysis and Management’s research team found that chlorine dioxide gas is effective against the virus. AirRX offers eco-friendly, powerful, and cost-effective disinfection solutions for commercial and public spaces. Their goal is to be your safe and clean air prescription to help keep your surroundings safe and hygienic.

Name: Loving the Farm
Description:
WHAT WE MAKE
Our soap is handmade using a process of soap-making that has been perfected for thousands of years. It sits a minimum of 6 weeks before selling to ensure a nice hard bar of soap that will last longer in the shower. All of our bars contain goats milk, natural oils and some contain other additions from our farm, such as my brother's honey!

GOATS MILK SOAP
Made from our very own fresh goats milk, goats milk soap is a safe and amazing alternative to still get you clean without all the chemicals in regular store bought soap.

LOCAL HONEY
Our bees are still a work in progress as we learn the skill of raising bees, harvesting honey and other products. Keep a look out! We will be sure to let you know when it's available!

HOT COCOA BOMBS
Made right here at the farm, our cocoa bombs are perfect for a cozy night in with a glass of hot cocoa!

FARM FRESH EGGS
Nothing is better than a farm fresh egg! Keep a look out for eggs from the chickens at Loving the Farm!

WHAT WE DO
And why we love doing it!
Along the way we noticed that kids often times didn't know or understand where their food came from. This was not only surprising, but also disappointing. Animals and 4-H have become a huge part of my life. Therefore, the goal of Loving the Farm is to provide fun and educational services, such as goat grams, hikes, tours, and goat yoga, in a fun and safe manner! That way we can all keep Loving the Farm! 

Thank you EmpowerLinked for promoting us on your platform of digital screens located in properties, businesses and organizations in the Northern IL area.

Name: Kare Soluções
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada em soluções de limpeza para restaurantes, padarias, refeitórios de empresas e demais estabelecimentos, além da indústria de alimentos. Nosso objetivo é fornecer soluções completas de higiene e segurança para o seu negócio.

Oferecemos os quatro principais produtos para esses estabelecimentos: limpador de gordura carbonizada, higiniezador com cloro ativo, detergente para louças e desinfetante 3 em 1 (desinfetante, detergente, desodorizador). Todos da categoria de produtos para uso profissional, tal como exige a Anvisa.

Nossos produtos possuem qualidade e eficiência garantidas. São concentrados e que devem ser diluídos antes do uso. Dessa forma, podem gerar uma economia de até 80% nos gastos com produtos de limpeza, sem comprometer a segurança e higiene do estabelecimento.

Além dos produtos, oferecemos também o Sistema de Dosagem, um equipamento com 4 diluidores que promovem a diluição correta dos produtos fornecidos pela Kare, em conformidade com as normas da Anvisa.

Além disso, fornecemos treinamento para garantir que nossos clientes saibam diluir nossos produtos corretamente e utilizá-los de forma eficaz.

Nosso compromisso é garantir a máxima eficácia da limpeza e, ao mesmo tempo, reduzir os custos para o cliente, mantendo seu ambiente limpo e seguro para seus funcionários e consumidores.

Com uma equipe experiente e dedicada, estamos sempre prontos para fornecer o melhor atendimento ao cliente. Excelência, transparência e atendimento personalizado (pré e pós-venda) são nossos principais diferenciais.

Se você está procurando uma solução completa e eficaz para a limpeza de seu restaurante ou indústria de alimentos, não procure mais. Entre em contato conosco e descubra como podemos ajudar seu negócio a manter um ambiente limpo, seguro e higiênico. Estamos ansiosos para trabalhar com você!

Description:
شرکت شریف صنعت پارسا به عنوان یک شرکت پیشرو در زمینه ارائه دستگاه های نظاف صنعتی شناخته می شود. این شرکت فعالیت خود را در زمینه ارائه دستگاههای مکانیزه نظافتی از سال 1391 در شهر تهران آغاز نمود. شرکت شریف صنعت پارسا با هدف ارائه باکیفیت ترین محصولات و دستگاههای نظافتی موجود در بازار جهانی، کمپانی شناخته شده Nilfisk را بعنوان شریک تجاری خود انتخاب نموده است و در حال حاضر نماینده انحصاری این تولید کننده معتبر اروپایی در ایران میباشد. در حال حاضر شرکت شریف صنعت پارسا به پشتوانه مدیریت منسجم، دانش فنی عمیق کارشناسان متعهد و همکاری با یکی از معتبرترین تولیدکنندگان تجهیزات نظافتی در سطح جهان، یکی از مطرح ترین قطب های ایران در زمینه نظافت صنعتی می باشد.
از محصولات متنوع شرکت شریف صنعت پارسا، می توان به اسکرابر، سوییپر، مبل و موکت شوی، پولیشر، جاروبرقی، واترجت در رده محصولات صنعتی اشاره نمود. همچنین این شرکت دارای مدل های متنوع جاروبرقی خانگی، واترجت خانگی و جاروی مرکزی می باشد که نیازهای نظافتی محیط های مسکونی و تجاری را به خوبی برطرف می نمایند. تنوع بالا مدل های موجود یه مشتریان امکان می دهد تا دستگاهی متناسب با نوع نیاز و عملکرد مورد نظر خود انتخاب نمایند.

Name: Evomolecular, Inc.
Description: A new type of chemical-free industrial cleaning solution, BioWash is regular water enriched into plasma that penetrates between the surface and contamination, destroying their intermolecular bonds and separating substances of differing densities. The plasma changes the places of the hydrogen atoms in the water molecule under the influence of high-voltage electric discharges. When BioWash is then diluted with ordinary water, the modified molecules accelerate the ions and particles present in the solution. The energy of this movement is just enough to break the intermolecular bonds with the dirt but not enough to damage the surface. Traditional cleaning agents are engineered to break the bonds of specific types of contamination on specific surfaces. A breakthrough technology, BioWash is the first truly universal, ecologically pure, cleaning solution and as enhanced water, has a multitude of applications. Safer than regular hand soap!

Name: CocoPam
Description:
Xà bông dưỡng ẩm trong suốt nhãn hiệu CocoPam

Là đơn vị đầu tiên tại Việt Nam sản xuất xà bông trong suốt, với độ dưỡng ẩm cao từ lô hội và các thành phần thiên nhiên khác như dầu dừa, dầu đậu nành. 
CocoPam mong muốn mang đến cho người Việt một sản phẩm xà bông thiên nhiên chất lượng cao, có tính thẩm mỹ và được làm từ chính những nguyên liệu thực vật đặc trưng của quê hương.

Mùi hương : Nhài Cherry
Xà bông trong suốt CocoPam với công dụng :
- Làm sạch dịu nhẹ, không khô rít 
- Cấp ẩm, khoáng chất cho da từ dịch chiết lô hội và glycerin
- Giảm mụn, vết thâm trên da
- Giúp da trắng sáng, loại bỏ tế bào chết
- Thu nhỏ lỗ chân lông
- Cải thiện khả năng phục hồi và vẻ trẻ trung của da 

Đặc điểm vượt trội của xà bông trong suốt so với các loại xà bông đục khác trên thị trường đó chính là độ pH của xà bông trong suốt thấp hơn đáng kể chỉ từ 7-7.8 trong khi xà bông đục là 8.5-10 điều này sẽ giúp cho da được thư giãn, tươi mát. Tránh hiện tượng xút ăn da. Phù hợp cho mọi loại da, đặc biệt tốt cho da nhạy cảm với hoá chất.
Xà bông trong suốt CocoPam đã được kiểm nghiệm và đoạt giải nhất tại triển lãm Ngày hội sáng tạo trẻ Bách Khoa 2022 

Lưu ý : 
- Xà bông từ thiên nhiên sẽ ít bọt hơn xà bông công nghiệp. 
- Xà bông với những thành phần dưỡng ẩm cao nên trong điều kiện ẩm ướt có thể hút ẩm và hình thành hiện tượng đổ mồ hôi. Điều này không ảnh hưởng tới chất lượng.
- Để đảm bảo tính thẩm mỹ, bảo quản xà bông tại nơi khô ráo tránh ngâm nước. Trường hợp xà bông bị đục đi cũng không ảnh hưởng tới chất lượng.

Thành phần chính : Dầu dừa, dầu đậu nành, dịch chiết lô hội, glycerin, tinh dầu hoa nhài
Khối lượng : 100g
HSD : 18 tháng kể từ ngày sản xuất
CocoPam xin chân thành cảm ơn quý khách
Made by CocoPamCosmetics

Name: Ecodryervent Cleaning Service
Description:
Cleaning your dryer vent is crucial for several reasons:
Fire Prevention: Lint buildup in the dryer vent is highly flammable and one of the leading causes of house fires. Regular cleaning significantly reduces this risk12.
Efficiency: A clean vent allows your dryer to work more efficiently. When the vent is clogged, your dryer has to work harder to dry clothes, which can lead to longer drying times and increased energy consumption13.
Cost Savings: By improving your dryer’s efficiency, you can save on energy bills. A clogged vent can cause your dryer to overheat and potentially damage the appliance, leading to costly repairs or replacements24.
Prolonged Dryer Life: Regular maintenance, including vent cleaning, can extend the lifespan of your dryer by preventing overheating and reducing wear and tear on the machine4.
Better Air Quality: A clogged vent can cause lint and dust to accumulate in your home, affecting indoor air quality. Keeping the vent clean helps maintain a healthier living environment4.
It’s generally recommended to clean your dryer vent at least once a year, or more frequently if you have a large family or pets56. Have you noticed any signs that your dryer vent might need cleaning?

Name: Musky Fresh
Description:
*Musky Fresh* ile çamaşırlarınız her yıkamada doğanın ferahlatıcı esintisiyle buluşsun! Yumuşatıcı yerine kullanabileceğiniz bu parfümlü granüller, 18 hafta boyunca kalıcı bir koku sağlarken tamamen doğal ve çevre dostu içeriğiyle fark yaratıyor. Çamaşırlarınızda uzun süre süren bu tazelik hissi, her giyimde sizi doğanın kucağına davet edecek.
Tamamen Doğal ve Güvenli*  
Musky Fresh, doğadan ilham alarak geliştirildi. *Gıda kimyasallarından üretilmiş* ve tamamen doğal bileşenler içerir. *Kanserojen madde içermez* ve insan sağlığı için güvenlidir. Hassas ciltler için uygun olup, çocuklarınızın ve sevdiklerinizin sağlığını riske atmadan güvenle kullanabilirsiniz.
Çevre Dostu, Yeşil Ekonomi ile Uyumlu*  
Dünyamıza olan sorumluluğumuzun farkındayız. *Musky Fresh, yeşil ekonomi prensiplerine uygun olarak üretilmiş, karbon ayak izini en aza indiren bir formülle geliştirilmiştir. **Sürdürülebilir* ve çevreye dost bir ürün arayanlar için mükemmel bir seçimdir. Çamaşır yıkama alışkanlıklarınızda çevreyi koruyarak doğaya katkıda bulunabilirsiniz.
Çamaşır Makinelerine Dost*  
Musky Fresh, çamaşır makinelerinizin performansını olumsuz etkilemeden maksimum temizlik sağlar. Çamaşır makinelerinizin ömrünü uzatır, iç aksamında kalıntı bırakmaz ve makinenizin sağlığına zarar vermez. Bu yönüyle hem çamaşırlarınızı hem de makinelerinizi koruyan bir üründür.
*Nasıl Kullanılır?*

Musky Fresh’in kullanımı oldukça kolaydır:  
1. *Kapaktaki ölçü* kadar granülü alın.  
2. Granülü çamaşır makinesinin tamburuna koyun, çamaşırlarınızı üzerine bırakın.  
3. Yumuşatıcı yerine kullanarak çamaşırlarınızı yıkayın.  
4. Her yıkamada, doğanın tazelik dolu kokusu çamaşırlarınızı saracak!
5. Yıkama esnasında yumuşatıcı kullanmayın!
*Musky Fresh ile Tazeliği Keşfedin!*

Yumuşatıcıya veda edin, *Musky Fresh* ile doğanın saf ve ferahlatıcı kokusunu çamaşırlarınızda yaşayın. Her yıkamada taptaze, kalıcı bir parfüm deneyimi yaşarken, sağlığınızı ve çevreyi korumanın huzurunu hissedin. *Musky Fresh*’i hemen

Name: Ni's Naturals
Description: This company was created by a U.S. Navy veteran due to a dire need. Our first born daughter, Ni, developed rashes and skin irritation due to using one of the nation's largest baby products company. It was so bad that we had to get products handmade. And then we moved. I had to figure out how to make natural soaps and moisturizers for our daughter that were all natural in nature. As I began to come up with equations to make these products, I knew she could not be the only one suffering like this. That was the birth of Ni's Naturals and we embarked on the journey to supply our community with natural ingredient products that would do no harm. We strive to get people back to basics and go toxin-free instead of the harsh chemicals waiting on a big box store shelf near you.

Welcome to Loogeenie's official LinkedIn page! We are on a mission to transform the way we approach toilet cleaning with our revolutionary product.

Loogeenie is the brainchild of Aldo Werjutina, Australia's oldest apprentice plumber, and his best mate, Joe Pittorini. Frustrated by the lack of effective toilet brushes on the market, the duo set out to create a product that would outperform standard brushes in terms of design and cleaning ability.

The Loogeenie is not just an ordinary toilet brush - it's a game-changer. Our flexible brush is equipped with silicone discs and high-quality bristles, allowing it to easily reach and clean hard-to-reach areas that traditional brushes miss. With its innovative design and dissolvable tablets, the Loogeenie provides a hygienic and efficient solution for toilet cleaning, making the chore less cumbersome and more effective.

Our passion for innovation and excellence drives us to continually enhance our product and deliver a first-class cleaning experience to our customers. We are committed to promoting a cleaner, healthier, and more sustainable way of maintaining hygiene in bathrooms.

Join us on this journey as we revolutionise the toilet cleaning industry, one Loogeenie at a time. Follow our page to stay updated on our latest products, news, and insights into the world of toilet cleaning and hygiene.

#Loogeenie #ToiletCleaning #Innovation #Hygiene #Sustainability

Name: Les Petits Savons
Description:
Les Petits Savons est une savonnerie artisanale implantée à Melrand, dans le Morbihan. 
Nous vous proposons une gamme de savons saponifiés à froid pour le corps et les cheveux, et une gamme de savons saponifiés à froid pour la vaisselle, le ménage et l’entretien du linge. 
Nos savons sont simples, avec des formes simples. 
Nous fabriquons nos savons dans un atelier dédié, selon la méthode ancestrale de la saponification à froid. Cette technique est exothermique (la réaction chimique produit de la chaleur) et par conséquent peu énergivore, permet de conserver les bienfaits des ingrédients introduits dans les produits. 
Nos savons pour le corps et les cheveux sont tous surgras (il reste des huiles dans le savon après la réaction chimique) afin d’apporter de réels bienfaits pour le consommateur. 
Nos produits sont tous évalués et validés par une pharmacienne toxicologue, experte en cosmétiques, et déclarés sur le portail européen (CPNP). Nous respectons les obligations réglementaires de notre secteur d’activité.

Name: The BBQ-CleanBag
Description:
Introducing the BBQ-CleanBag

The BBQ-CleanBag’ is a revolutionary cleaning product. A combination of a cleaning powder and a durable bag that cleans effectively, easily, and hygienically. Without much effort and without waste.

The revolutionary aspect of the product isn’t just the cleaning solution itself. It’s the smart durable bag, where grills, of various sizes, the cleaning powder and some hot water could be placed together. The BBQ-CleanBag’ will do its magic in 40 minutes; effortlessly dissolving grease and grime, leaving the grill sparkling clean. An essential gadget, that can be used for over five times.

Allowing all grill masters and barbecue enthusiasts, to focus on what truly mattered, creating cherished moments and indulging in delicious, perfectly grilled meals.

So no more dampers on a pleasant evening of grilling meat on your barbecue because of chemical cleaners in your green garden, a lot of waste, black stains on your clothes, and a grill that never stays shiny and hygienic after use. 

We've poured our heart and soul into creating the BBQ-CleanBag, and we want to bring it to your backyard. By launching on Indiegogo, we're not just seeking funds; we're inviting you to be part of our journey. Your support will help us take this eco-friendly marvel to mass production and make grill cleaning a household norm.

Together, we can redefine grill maintenance, reduce waste, and create a cleaner, greener BBQ world. 

The BBQ-CleanBag - for smart grillers only!

Description:
With the amount of forever chemicals, toxic plastics, & harmful ingredients found in nearly everything these days, we decided the make a necessary change.

After months of trial and error & dozens of manufacturers recommending we "don't worry about plastic packaging" or we "use mostly sustainable ingredients to help cut costs" we've finally found the solution.

Enter Pure Clean Sustainable Sheets. Made with ONLY sustainable ingredients. Laundry detergent that isn't bottled in large plastic jugs that occupy landfills for hundreds of years. A product that doesn't leave harsh chemicals on your clothes that irritate your skin.

And while we know sustainable laundry detergent is just one small step towards a brighter future, it's a step nonetheless. So we ask that you join us in our mission to create a cleaner and greener future, one load at a time.

 

DID YOU KNOW?

Over 700 million plastic laundry detergent jugs are thrown away each year in the United States alone. These plastic jugs are often left at landfills where they can take up to 500 years to decompose. Unlike traditional detergent packaging, our sheets are made and packaged with biodegradable compostable materials ONLY.

Name: čistilni servis PURO
Description:
Pri Puro razumem, kako dragocen je mamin čas. Nekaterim je čiščenje muka, meni pa je sprostitev. Užitek, ko vidim razliko prej/potem, ko se zavem, da bo stranka spala v bolj čisti postelji brez pršic, da njene zavese ne hranijo prahu in da rože lažje dihajo, ker so bile pod tušem.

Obožujem detajle, ki jih drugi pogosto spregledajo. Vsako brisanje, pomivanje ali čiščenje je zame majhen ritual - da dom zaživi, da diha in da je prijeten vsak prostor, ki ga uporabljate vi in vaša družina. Uporabljam ekološka slovenska čistila in čistilni sistem Hyla, ker verjamem, da je čistoča tudi skrb za zdravje in dobro počutje.

Moje čiščenje ni le pomivanje površin – ustvarjam prostor, kjer se lažje diha, kjer je mir in kjer vsak član vaše družine začuti razliko. Vsaka minuta, ki jo prihranite, je namenjena vam – objemom, kavi v miru, ustvarjanju, smehu in življenju, ki ga želite živeti.

Verjamem, da čistoča ni le red, ampak prostor za srečo. Pridružite se tistim, ki so že odkrili, da je življenje brez nepotrebnega stresa bolj polno. Vaš dom, vaš mir, vaš čas - prepustite jih Puro + Hyla.

Name: Mist Away
Description:
Mist Away was born out of frustration, as a mum and as a professional cleaner I found my biggest enemy became streaks and chemicals, so that's why I decided to tackle both in one product. Fed up of washing windows 4 times to get rid of streaks just to look 10 minutes later and they were back again, I became determined to find a solution.

After a ton of research, I found out that by passing water through a complex series of filters multiple times you can remove 99.9% of contaminates making it the purest water. When there are no contaminates it makes the water hungry to absorb dirt on surfaces making it the perfect partner when I'm out working as a cleaner or cleaning as a parent. 

This water is now called Mist Away. Mist Away is our exciting cleaning product that guarantees a streak free shine, chemical free house and stress free cleaning! Apply it to multiple surfaces in multiple rooms in your home and the results don't fade.  And as mentioned earlier our product is 100% Chemical free and friendly to you, your family and pets all leading to a stress and frustration free cleaning life.

Καθαρισμό κεραμικών και άλλων πατωμάτων με τη χρήση ειδικών μηχανημάτων. 9. Καθαρισμό μετά απο πυρκαγιά καθώς επίσης και άλλων γενικών καθαρισμών.

Name: Questa Clean
Description:
Welcome to QuestaClean – your trusted partner in the journey towards a cleaner, healthier, and more sustainable environment. At QuestaClean, we believe that the foundation of a thriving community starts with the spaces we live and work in.

We are more than just a cleaning company; we are a team of environmentally conscious professionals dedicated to promoting eco-friendly practices. QuestaClean is committed to using biodegradable and non-toxic cleaning agents and innovative methods that are safe for you and the planet.

Our mission is to provide top-notch cleaning services that not only meet but exceed your expectations, ensuring every corner we touch is left spotless and sanitized. Trust, integrity, and professionalism guide every aspect of our operations, making us a leading cleaning service provider in the UK.

QuestaClean is committed to environmental stewardship. We comply with the Environmental Protection Act 1990 and the Waste (England and Wales) Regulations 2011 by using eco-friendly cleaning products and methods, minimizing waste, and recycling whenever possible.

We strictly adhere to the Health and Safety at Work etc. Act 1974 and the Control of Substances Hazardous to Health Regulations 2002 (COSHH). This involves conducting regular risk assessments, ensuring all staff are fully trained in health and safety procedures, and using only approved cleaning substances and methods to protect both our employees and clients.

At QuestaClean, our mission is to provide exceptional cleaning services while maintaining the highest levels of compliance and protection for our clients, employees, and the environment.

Have any questions about our cleaning services? Feel free to contact us via email or by using the contact form below.
